transcript.answer_text: You should hire me because I combine AI knowledge with practical development experience. I have worked on real AI projects involving OCR, LLMs, RAG systems, and full-stack applications, and I learn new technologies quickly. I am also disciplined, adaptable, and focused on delivering reliable solutions while working well with teams.

During the project, I worked on data preprocessing, model training, debugging, and optimization, while also managing the backend workflow and testing. This project helped me strengthen both my AI and problem-solving skills.
